/usr/local/cuda-9.0/bin/nvcc  -gencode arch=compute_50,code=[sm_50,compute_50] -w -std=c++11 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink CMakeFiles/auto_marker.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auto_marker.dir/auto_marker_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o -o CMakeFiles/auto_marker.dir/cmake_device_link.o  -L/usr/local/cuda-9.0/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-9.0/targets/x86_64-linux/lib -lboost_system -lboost_filesystem ../../lib/darknet/libdarknet.a ../../lib/imageproc/libimageproc.a -lopencv_core -lopencv_imgcodecs -lopencv_imgproc -lcudnn -lcublas -lcurand -lcudart -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
